title: Tip4serv Donation Webstore
description: Monetize your server and get donation with Tip4serv's customizable webstore for selling items and ranks. Seamlessly accept over 25 of the world's most popular payment methods. Benefit from DDoS protection and a host of complimentary features.
body:
**Tip4Serv** is a complete **Minecraft Webstore** that allows server owners to sell ranks, kits, crates, VIP memberships, subscriptions, virtual currency, cosmetics and other digital products with automatic delivery.

Looking for a **Tebex Alternative** or **Buycraft Alternative**? Tip4Serv helps you create a professional donation store in minutes with support for Stripe, PayPal, Google Pay, Apple Pay and many other payment methods.

Create your own Minecraft store and start accepting payments today: https://tip4serv.com/?ads=modrinth

## Why choose Tip4Serv?

* Create your Minecraft webstore in less than 5 minutes
* Sell ranks, kits, crates, subscriptions and virtual currency
* Automatic command execution after payment
* Compatible with LuckPerms and any command-based plugin
* Support for Paper, Spigot, Purpur, Velocity and BungeeCord
* Discord role delivery and notifications
* Subscription & recurring payments support
* Discount coupons and promotions
* Stock management
* Detailed sales statistics
* No advertisements on your store
* Available in 15 languages

## Modern Store Examples

* https://tip4serv.com/demos

## Starter Plan (Only 5% Fee)

* Unlimited servers
* Unlimited commands
* Subscription products
* Discord rewards
* Coupon codes
* Stock management
* Order tracking
* Email invoices
* Sales analytics
* Store managers
* Custom subdomain
* Command delivery logs
* No advertisements

## PRO Features

* Dynamic Dark & Light themes
* Custom CSS
* Advanced theme editor
* Product gallery & videos
* Steam, Discord & Minecraft account linking
* Customer avatars
* Top customers widget
* Related products widget
* Featured products widget

## Payment Methods

Accept payments worldwide using:

Visa, Mastercard, PayPal, Google Pay, Apple Pay, Cash App, iDEAL, Bancontact, Sofort, SEPA, Amazon Pay, Revolut Pay, MobilePay, Multibanco, Przelewy24, Boleto, OXXO, Afterpay, Link and more.

## How It Works

After a payment is completed, Tip4Serv automatically executes commands on your Minecraft server.

Examples:

* Give LuckPerms ranks
* Give money
* Give crates
* Give keys
* Unlock cosmetics
* Add Discord roles
* Execute custom commands

## Setup in 4 Steps

### 1. Create Your Store

Choose your store name and URL.

### 2. Configure Payments

Connect Stripe or PayPal.

### 3. Connect Your Minecraft Server

Use the Tip4Serv plugin and your API key.

### 4. Create Products

Add ranks, crates, kits, subscriptions or any custom reward.

## Commands

### Minecraft Server

`tip4serv connect`
Connect your Minecraft server to Tip4Serv.

`tip4serv reload`
Process pending orders.

`/storelink`
Display your store URL in chat.

### Velocity & BungeeCord

`tip4proxy connect`
Connect your proxy.

`tip4proxy reload`
Process pending orders.

## Supported Use Cases

* Minecraft Donations
* Minecraft Ranks
* LuckPerms Stores
* Minecraft Webshops
* Minecraft Subscriptions
* Minecraft Monetization
* Minecraft Payment Gateway
* Minecraft Digital Products
* Server Donations
* VIP Memberships
* Crates & Keys

## Need Help?

https://docs.tip4serv.com/games/minecraft

Support:
